description: Mexican drug trafficking organization based in Tijuana, Baja California, founded in 1989 by the Arellano Félix brothers after the fragmentation of the Guadalajara Cartel. It was one of the largest and most violent cartels in Mexico during the 1980s and 1990s, but has been weakened by arrests and deaths of its leaders. Since 2014, it has allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, effectively merging into the CTNG.

country_links.evidence_quote: huyeron a Colombia y recibieron protección por parte de miembros del asociado Cártel de Cali.
country_links.context: Members of the cartel fled to Colombia and received protection from the Cali Cartel.

country_links.evidence_quote: Las autoridades mexicanas dicen que se ha invertido en el sector inmobiliario de Estados Unidos... Fue extraditado a los Estados Unidos el 29 de abril de 2011 para enfrentar cargos de tráfico de cocaína en California.
country_links.context: The cartel invested in real estate in the United States and its members were extradited there to face charges.
